author: jsign
content: Creating thread if any guest program starts trying out these inputs and have any feedback.

author: jsign
content: We have a CI where we run EEST stateless guest on those same devnet blocks and [had a positive signal](https://github.com/eth-act/zkevm-benchmark-workload/actions/runs/29829802725).

author: omerfirmak
content: Thanks, looks like the tarball structure and the json schema changed a bit, but managed to get it working again. I have been following devnet-7 statelessly already with no issues so far. But this will give better coverage with the witness and all.
